# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

database = postgres

pg_host = postgres.internal
pg_port = 5432
pg_database = kong
pg_user = kong
pg_password = change_me
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on

proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl http2 reuseport backlog=16384
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl

status_listen = 127.0.0.1:8100
anonymous_reports = off
log_level = notice

nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = on

trusted_ips = 127.0.0.1,::1
real_ip_header = X-Forwarded-For
real_ip_recursive = on
